string.text: Move All Blocker Super Extended
Move All Blocker Super Extended
Prevents you from transferring some items when pressing "Move all"
Don't transfer favorites
Items marked as favorite won't be moved.
Don't transfer junk into my stashes
Items marked as favorite won't be moved into player-made stashes.
Don't transfer task items
Items required for tasks won't be moved.
Don't transfer unusable parts into my stashes
Part items that are too damaged won't be moved into player-made stashes. My other mod, Unusable Parts Handler, is required.
Super Extended Options
Enable Dynamic Block Option
Enable the Super Extended options
Keep Blacklisted Items After QRS
Turn on to keep Blocked Items in inventory on QRS
Keep Favorite Items After QRS
Turn on to keep Favorites in inventory on QRS
Enable Config File
Enable the config file at "configs/items/settings/ym_move_all_blocked_items.ltx". Will combine with your already-blocked items in-game.
Refresh Config File
Edit the config file "configs/items/settings/ym_move_all_blocked_items.ltx" then press this button to your permanently blocked items.
%c[255,255,0,0]Reset all blocked items. No going back!%c[255,255,255,255] Does not affect items listed in config file.
Modifier
Hold this key to show or hide the block option
Toggle Keybind

Press this, while holding the keybind above, to toggle between always show and always hide the block option.\nMake sure to not be pressing anything else, or already have the item context menu open. Be patient, press the key, then right-click
Auto Block Equipped Ammo
Enable to automatically block ammos for all your equipped weapons. Will overwrite any manually blocked ammos, if you equip then unequip the corresponding gun.
